run.strategy: Option B: Yaura mechanical redesign + 3 validation iterations
run.validation: generated roster identity and rules parity passed before/after each iteration

Yaura: Blood Infusion remains next-attack setup, no direct armor-ignore.
Blood Price is now a Bleed payoff instead of repeated self/ally HP tax.
Blood Ward gives Armor and punishes attackers with Bleed.
Red Rain is the AoE Bleed setup with a small self-cost.
